name: Better Hide 'Em Gems
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the melted semi-sweet chocolate, crunchy peanut butter, graham cracker crumbs, and butter until combined.
2. Gradually add the confectioner's sugar and stir until a firm dough forms.
3. Pat the mixture into a 13" x 9-inch pan, spreading melted chocolate evenly on top.
4. Chill the pan for at least 30 minutes or until set.
5. Cut into small pieces once chilled.
6. Store in an airtight container to keep them hidden from others. Enjoy!
